import pytest
from myapp.db import Database

db = Database("sqlite:///test.db")

def test_create_user():
    db.execute("INSERT INTO users (name, email) VALUES ('alice', 'alice@test.com')")
    user = db.query_one("SELECT * FROM users WHERE name = 'alice'")
    assert user is not None

def test_update_user_email():
    user = db.query_one("SELECT * FROM users WHERE name = 'alice'")
    db.execute(f"UPDATE users SET email = 'newalice@test.com' WHERE id = {user['id']}")
    updated = db.query_one(f"SELECT * FROM users WHERE id = {user['id']}")
    assert updated["email"] == "newalice@test.com"

def test_delete_user():
    user = db.query_one("SELECT * FROM users WHERE name = 'alice'")
    db.execute(f"DELETE FROM users WHERE id = {user['id']}")
    assert db.query_one("SELECT * FROM users WHERE name = 'alice'") is None

def test_list_users_empty():
    users = db.query("SELECT * FROM users")
    assert len(users) == 0
